words.def: completely and without qualification; used informally as intensifiers
words.zh: adv. 完全地, 全然, 絕對

words.def: in accordance with truth or fact or reality

words.zh: vi. 信賴, 依賴, 信任

words.def: a principle or condition that customarily governs behavior
words.zh: n. 規則, 統治, 控制, 支配, 規律, 標準, 章程, 破折號, 鉛線

words.def: proper alignment; the property possessed by something that is in correct or proper alignment
words.zh: a. 真實的, 正確的, 忠誠的, 可靠的, 純粹的, 正式的

words.def: earnest and conscientious activity intended to do or accomplish something
words.zh: n. 嘗試, 試驗, 審理, 審判

words.def: a brutal terrorist group active in Kashmir; fights against India with the goal of restoring Islamic rule of India
words.zh: vt. 讓, 假設, 出租, 排放, 妨礙
adv. 還, 尚, 仍然, 已經, 然而
